content_fingerprint: two years running local ai on a laptop open models outpaced moore s law a community authored deep dive on hugging face traces two years of running open source ai models on consumer laptop hardware finding that model efficiency gains have consistently outrun the historical pace of moore s law mishig davaadorj a community member and ai researcher published a personal account on the hugging face blog on may 11 2026 documenting two consecutive years of running open source ai models locally on a laptop the post examines whether the open model ecosystem has improved fast enough on efficiency and cap
